title: The Mariah Carey Fan Club: A Conversation with Alex Da Corte
description: “I probably shouldn’t go on too much about how I love her, but I was part of the Mariah Carey fan club in the late eighties, and I wrote letters to her as early as I could.”
hook: A video artist obsessed with Mariah Carey since childhood explains why her fandom matters more than he probably should admit—and why that's exactly the point.

title: Gather your witches, it's the year of the coven on screen
description: From Camp to The Serpent's Skin, a charmed range of witch-filled covens are fighting back against the powers that be.
hook: Witches are having a moment on screen, and it's less about spell-casting than about collective resistance to systems designed to break women down.

title: America's foundational literary genre wasn't the novel or the sermon. It was the captivity narrative
description: America's foundational literary genre wasn't the novel or the sermon. It was the captivity narrative
hook: Before the American novel even existed, captivity narratives shaped how we tell stories about survival, identity, and who gets to narrate their own escape.
